  "english": {
    "IsA": [
      "It is a tall structure, taller than it is wide, often by a significant factor.",
      "It is a self-supporting structure.",
      "It is distinguished from masts by its lack of guy-wires.",
      "It is distinguished from buildings in that it is built not to be habitable but to serve other functions using its height.",
      "It is a structure that can stand alone or be supported by adjacent buildings.",
      "It is a feature on top of a larger structure or building.",
      "It is a structure that can be made with parallel sides up to a certain height.",
      "It is a structure that requires sufficient stiffness to avoid breaking under loads.",
      "It is a structure that is subject to varying winds, vortex shedding, and seismic disturbances.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to store items or liquids.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to aim an object into the earth.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to support bridges.",
      "It is a structure that can reach heights that rival some of the tallest buildings above-water.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to give visibility to help direct aviation traffic.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to access tall or high objects.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to access atmospheric conditions aloft.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to lift high tension cables for electrical power distribution.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to expel and disperse potentially harmful gases and particulates into the atmosphere.",
      "It is a structure that can be used to protect from exposure.",
      "It is a structure used for industrial production.",
      "It is a structure used for surveying.",
      "It is a structure used to drop objects.",
      "It is a structure used to test height-intensive applications.",
      "It is a structure used to improve structural integrity.",
      "It is a structure used to mimic towers or provide height for training purposes.",

      "It is a structure used for recreation.",
      "It is a structure used as a symbol.",

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それは幅よりも著しく高い、背の高い構造物です。",
      "それは自立構造物です。",
      "それはガイワイヤーがないことでマストと区別されます。",
      "それは居住を目的とせず、その高さを利用して他の機能を提供するように建てられている点で建物と区別されます。",
      "それは単独で立つか、隣接する建物に支えられる構造物です。",
      "それはより大きな構造物や建物の上の特徴です。",
      "それはある高さまで、平行な側面を持つ支持構造で作ることができる構造物です。",
      "それは負荷の下で壊れないように十分な剛性を必要とする構造物です。",
      "それは変動する風、渦放出、地震擾乱の影響を受ける構造物です。",
      "それはアイテムや液体を保管するために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは物体を地面に狙うために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは橋を支えるために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは水上の最も高い建物の一部に匹敵する高さに達することができる構造物です。",
      "それは航空交通を誘導するのに役立つ視認性を提供するために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは高くまたは高い物体にアクセスするために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは上空の大気条件にアクセスするために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは電力供給のための高張力ケーブルを lifting するために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは有害なガスや粒子を大気中に排出し分散させるために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは暴露から保護するために使用できる構造物です。",
      "それは工業生産に使用される構造物です。",
      "それは測量に使用される構造物です。",
      "それは物体を落下させるために使用される構造物です。",
      "それは高さ集約型アプリケーションをテストするために使用される構造物です。",
      "それは構造的完全性を改善するために使用される構造物です。",
      "それは塔を模倣したり、訓練目的で高さを提供したりするために使用される構造物です。",
      "それは芸術として使用される構造物です。",
      "それはレクリエーションに使用される構造物です。",
      "それはシンボルとして使用される構造物です。",
      "それは高層ビルでの消火/救助活動に使用される、非常に高いはしごを備えた消防設備です。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それはガイワイヤーがないという特徴があります。",
      "それは高さがあります。",
      "それは支持構造を持っています。",
      "それは圧縮荷重がかかります。",
      "それは建物の周辺に支持構造があります。",
      "それは格子構造を持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは幅よりも高いという特徴があります。",
      "それは自立しているという特徴があります。",

      "それは視認性が特徴です。",

IsA: It is a tall structure, taller than it is wide, often by a significant factor.
It is a self-supporting structure.
It is distinguished from masts by its lack of guy-wires.
It is distinguished from buildings in that it is built not to be habitable but to serve other functions using its height.
It is a structure that can stand alone or be supported by adjacent buildings.
It is a feature on top of a larger structure or building.
It is a structure that can be made with parallel sides up to a certain height.
It is a structure that requires sufficient stiffness to avoid breaking under loads.
It is a structure that is subject to varying winds, vortex shedding, and seismic disturbances.
It is a structure that can be used to store items or liquids.
It is a structure that can be used to aim an object into the earth.
It is a structure that can be used to support bridges.
It is a structure that can reach heights that rival some of the tallest buildings above-water.
It is a structure that can be used to give visibility to help direct aviation traffic.
It is a structure that can be used to access tall or high objects.
It is a structure that can be used to access atmospheric conditions aloft.
It is a structure that can be used to lift high tension cables for electrical power distribution.
It is a structure that can be used to expel and disperse potentially harmful gases and particulates into the atmosphere.
It is a structure that can be used to protect from exposure.
It is a structure used for industrial production.
It is a structure used for surveying.
It is a structure used to drop objects.
It is a structure used to test height-intensive applications.
It is a structure used to improve structural integrity.
It is a structure used to mimic towers or provide height for training purposes.
It is a structure used as art.
It is a structure used for recreation.
It is a structure used as a symbol.
It is firefighting equipment with an extremely tall ladder designed for use in firefighting/rescue operations involving high-rise buildings.

IsA: それは幅よりも著しく高い、背の高い構造物です。
それは自立構造物です。
それはガイワイヤーがないことでマストと区別されます。
それは居住を目的とせず、その高さを利用して他の機能を提供するように建てられている点で建物と区別されます。

それはより大きな構造物や建物の上の特徴です。
それはある高さまで、平行な側面を持つ支持構造で作ることができる構造物です。
それは負荷の下で壊れないように十分な剛性を必要とする構造物です。
